objective:
[Scalp de continuation / micro-retournement] sur [crypto liquide] [5m ou 15m].
Indicateurs : [EMA 9/21/50] + [RSI 14] + [Bandes de Bollinger 20,2].
Entrées : [pullback vers EMA 21 avec RSI repartant dans le sens de la micro-tendance et rejet d’une bande] / [excès sur bande externe avec RSI en surachat/survente et signal de retournement court terme].
Sorties : [take-profit sur extension vers bande opposée ou prochain niveau de structure] / [sortie anticipée si clôture franche contre la position ou divergence RSI].
Risk management : [stop-loss sous dernier plus bas/haut local ou 1× ATR] / [ratio minimum 1,5] / [risque fixe 1–2 % du capital par trade].

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy combines EMA for trend identification, RSI for overbought/oversold signals, and Bollinger Bands for volatility-based entry points. The combination should filter high-quality signals by requiring a pullback to the EMA with RSI confirming the trend and Bollinger Bands creating a boundry.

The combination of EMA for trend direction, RSI for overbought/oversold conditions, and Bollinger Bands for volatility and potential reversals should provide a robust signal. The EMA 21 acts as a support/resistance level, while RSI indicates when the pullback is ready to reverse. Bollinger Bands add another layer by identifying overshot conditions that could lead to a retracement.

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of Bollinger Bands and RSI will identify oversold/overbought conditions while the EMA will help in confirming trend direction. This should lead to better entry points with improved risk management.
